name: Traffic 删除推送验证
description: 删除记录后列表移除且详情显示原因

steps.code: (async () => { const d = await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:9900/_bifrost/api/traffic/updates?limit=50').then(r => r.json()); const all = [...(d.new_records || []), ...(d.updated_records || [])]; const pick = all.find(r => r.s > 0 && (r.flags & 0b111) === 0); return pick?.id || all[0]?.id || ''; })()

steps.message: 成功读取待删除的记录 ID

steps.code: (() => { const el = document.querySelector(`[data-record-id='${recordId}']`); if (el) { el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('dblclick', { bubbles: true })); } return true; })()

(async () => { const d = await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:9900/_bifrost/api/traffic', { method: 'DELETE', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ ids: [window.__lastRecordId] }) }).then(r => r.json()); window.__deleteResp = d; return d; })()

steps.message: 删除后列表已移除记录
详情区域显示删除原因
